validation.focused_rch_contract: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR="${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_rch_quiet_phase_receipt" CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test rch_quiet_phase_receipt_contract -- --nocapture
